div.h1: Performance Model: Lexer Throughput & O(n) Complexity

g.text: Panel A — Operation Count & Throughput Estimate

ol.li: advance() moves current by exactly 1. Total advance() calls across life of Scanner = n.
Sum of all token lengths emitted = n.
s.source[start:current] is a slice, O(k). Result: Σ O(kᵢ) = O(Σ kᵢ) = O(n). ∎
